c.d: The number of active users on the platform, indicating popularity and likelihood of friends being on the service.
c.s: Company reports, market analysis reports, app store metrics

c.d: The ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's design, affecting how smoothly users can interact with friends.
c.s: User reviews, expert reviews, usability studies

c.d: The range and quality of messaging features such as text, voice, video, and multimedia sharing.
c.s: App store descriptions, user reviews, feature comparisons

c.d: The level of privacy and security measures implemented to protect user data and communications.
c.s: Security audits, privacy policies, user reviews

c.d: The ability to integrate with other social media platforms, enhancing the ease of keeping up with friends across different services.
c.s: App features list, user reviews, integration documentation
